programs.title: NOVA
programs.desc: How discoveries over the past 50 years have revolutionized people's understanding of the universe.

programs.title: Shared Planet
programs.desc: From Kenya to Mexico, people and wildlife find a harmonious balance in Earth's most vulnerable landscapes.

programs.title: Life on Earth: Attenborough's Greatest Adventure
programs.desc: The story behind David Attenborough's wildlife documentary series "Life on Earth," which changed his life forever.

programs.title: Amanpour and Company
programs.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programs.title: The Mustangs: America's Wild Horses
programs.desc: With more than 80,000 wild horses on federal lands and more than 50,000 in government corrals, filmmakers Steven Latham and Conrad Stanley reveal why the protection of America's wild horses is more important than ever.

programs.title: Great Scenic Railway Journeys 30th Anniversary Special
programs.desc: Some of America's best railway adventures, from the Rocky Mountaineer to the Skyrail, these stories offer a glimpse into our nation's railroad history and explore how railroads defined the spirit of North America.
